title: gilberta tenuifolia
intro: Gilberta tenuifolia, also known as the golden tansy or Mexican tansy, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to repel insects, treat digestive issues, and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Gilberta tenuifolia include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Gilberta tenuifolia is often prepared for use in herbal remedies through teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution due to its potential toxicity.
